display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: With her camper van Helen, Susan explores the rugged Ilkley Moor, the village of Upperthong and Holmfirth, the setting of the sitcom "Last of the Summer Wine."

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: Mammals have mastered every environment on Earth, but today the planet is changing faster than ever. Mammals must change with it to have a chance of survival in this, the new wild.

programme.title: Off The Grid With Colin And Manu
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Colin and Manu are back on the road in Aotearoa, starting in Stewart Island chasing blue cod then hit the road for a venison riverside cook-up with Betty on the way to Te Anau. S2 E1

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: In Safe Hands: A Southland woman shares stories of mental resilience and farm safety through workshops and children’s books, inspired by the couple’s life on their sheep and beef station.

programme.title: Off The Grid With Colin And Manu
programme.desc: Colin and Manu fly into Fiordland to cook onboard Pure Salt, then head to Otago for axe throwing with Laura from Real Country before cycling the high country at Minaret Station. S2 E2

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Season Finale: The theft of a family heirloom leaves Ray and Trudy Neilson with blood on their hands. S12 E6

programme.title: Coldwater
programme.desc: John, full of regret over his friendship with Tommy, attempts to voice his suspicions to Fiona, who feels she needs space from John. S1 E4

programme.title: Q+A with Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Ted gets excited when he finds Gordon is having an affair. And estranged from her friends, Candy returns to the dark side. S5 E9

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ
programme.desc: Actors Lisa Chappel and Tammy Davis join comedian Angella Dravid in a battle of the brains, but only one of them can make it to the final round and a chance at winning $10,000 for charity.

programme.title: The Secret Genius Of Modern Life
programme.desc: Season Finale: Hannah takes a drive to the National Highways control centre for the UK’s busiest motorway to meet the team that keep the motorways running 24/7.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You? Christmas Special
programme.desc: Rob, David and Lee are joined by Josh Widdicombe, Ray Winstone, Rachel Riley and Ricky Tomlinson for a Christmas Special.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Tom Gleeson awards the Big Brass Mug to whichever expert best answers his Hard Quiz questions on their expert topic: Hello Kitty, Triumph motorcycles, actor Michael J. Fox, and more.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Mrs Brown gets into the spirit of Christmas and tries to get the whole family together to celebrate the silly season.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody keeps his distance.

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Dr. Dev Shah tackles a "giant" lipoma, while Dr. Natalia Spierings treats a chunky keloid. S5 E1

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa
programme.desc: Join comedian Pax Assadi and conservation hero Nicola Toki as they dive headfirst into the Hauraki Gulf, where they come close to teeny tiny birds and majestic sea creatures.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - NZ v Iran
programme.desc: Join us for Live coverage of the first match for New Zealand in Group G as they take on Iran from SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The classic sitcom about two ill-matched friends. 'Those whom God hath joined together let no man put asunder' - does that include Terry Collier.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 1970s comedy at its finest. Bob and Thelma begin their married life with a Norwegian honeymoon - far away from Terry's destructive influence.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Rodney Bewes and James Bolam play chalk and cheese mates Bob and Terry in this 70s sitcom. Feeling nostalgic, the lads decide to chat up two women at a restaurant.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Iconic 1970s sitcom with James Bolam and Rodney Bewes. Mrs Chambers has grandiose plans for Thelma's wedding to Bob. But stirred up by Terry's ridicule, the men rebel.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 70s sitcom sequel from arguably Britain's finest comedy scribes - Clement and La Frenais. To Terry's dismay, Bob scorns the stag night tradition of drunken revelry.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The classic sitcom about two ill-matched friends. 'Those whom God hath joined together let no man put asunder' - does that include Terry Collier.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 1970s comedy at its finest. Bob and Thelma begin their married life with a Norwegian honeymoon - far away from Terry's destructive influence.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson discovers how the Cornish village of Botallack was the centre of the Cornish tin and copper mining industry and supplied a deadly poison to the world.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: How have humans changed New Zealand's landscape? Told through the experiences of its native species, including a flightless parrot, mankind's impact is assessed.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: From pythons in Bangkok to otters in Singapore, a look at the extraordinary ways wildlife is making itself at home in the world's cities.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Explores how various animals go about travelling in and out of cities for the basic needs of food and shelter.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Stories of animals who have managed to adapt and survive despite being displaced by the growth of cities.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: How have humans changed New Zealand's landscape? Told through the experiences of its native species, including a flightless parrot, mankind's impact is assessed.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: From pythons in Bangkok to otters in Singapore, a look at the extraordinary ways wildlife is making itself at home in the world's cities.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Explores how various animals go about travelling in and out of cities for the basic needs of food and shelter.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Stories of animals who have managed to adapt and survive despite being displaced by the growth of cities.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: How have humans changed New Zealand's landscape? Told through the experiences of its native species, including a flightless parrot, mankind's impact is assessed.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: From pythons in Bangkok to otters in Singapore, a look at the extraordinary ways wildlife is making itself at home in the world's cities.

programme.desc: Explores how various animals go about travelling in and out of cities for the basic needs of food and shelter.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Stories of animals who have managed to adapt and survive despite being displaced by the growth of cities.

programme.desc: How have humans changed New Zealand's landscape? Told through the experiences of its native species, including a flightless parrot, mankind's impact is assessed.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: From pythons in Bangkok to otters in Singapore, a look at the extraordinary ways wildlife is making itself at home in the world's cities.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Explores how various animals go about travelling in and out of cities for the basic needs of food and shelter.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Stories of animals who have managed to adapt and survive despite being displaced by the growth of cities.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: How have humans changed New Zealand's landscape? Told through the experiences of its native species, including a flightless parrot, mankind's impact is assessed.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: From pythons in Bangkok to otters in Singapore, a look at the extraordinary ways wildlife is making itself at home in the world's cities.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Explores how various animals go about travelling in and out of cities for the basic needs of food and shelter.

programme.title: Wild Metropolis
programme.desc: Stories of animals who have managed to adapt and survive despite being displaced by the growth of cities.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along The Mexico Border
programme.desc: Sue Perkins visits the city of Tijuana, where she discovers an unexpected community of migrants - American retirees looking to enjoy the good life at an affordable price.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson uncovers evidence of the German occupation of the Jersey village of Gorey and the role it played in defending the UK.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A maintenance team attempts to overhaul a finicky gearbox while another team must shunt an electric passenger train across multiple rail crossings during peak hour.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A rusty 10-ton water tank gets cut off of a vintage engine in the Adelaide Hills, and Kuranda Scenic Railway carriages get spruced up by the Queensland Rail carpentry team.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: In Melbourne, the busy SCT maintenance team expect the unexpected every day as they provision, inspect and shunt engines in and out of a bustling maintenance pit.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The crew at Downer Rail in Sydney fix a leaking air conditioner while QR's Rail Operations Response Unit attempt to remove debris from high voltage train power lines.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A maintenance team attempts to overhaul a finicky gearbox while another team must shunt an electric passenger train across multiple rail crossings during peak hour.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A rusty 10-ton water tank gets cut off of a vintage engine in the Adelaide Hills, and Kuranda Scenic Railway carriages get spruced up by the Queensland Rail carpentry team.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: In Melbourne, the busy SCT maintenance team expect the unexpected every day as they provision, inspect and shunt engines in and out of a bustling maintenance pit.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: The crew at Downer Rail in Sydney fix a leaking air conditioner while QR's Rail Operations Response Unit attempt to remove debris from high voltage train power lines.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Clement and La Frenais' sitcom sequel. Terry is off his beer and making midnight visits to Bob's house to discuss the meaning and mystery of life. Could this be love.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Sitcom about two ill-matched friends, from the writers of Porridge and Auf Wiedersehen Pet. Bob's married life promises work, worry and wallpapering.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish laughs. According to Shakespeare, 'wine is a gentle stimulant and good companion' - and so is Terry on the night Bob gets breathalysed.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The original men behaving badly. Bob and Terry challenge each other to a cross-country cycle race. Of course, you would expect the wily Terry to cheat - but Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Some Day We'll Laugh about This: Brilliant 1970s sitcom. Bob and Thelma go away to Scotland for the weekend, leaving Terry in charge of their new home. Will Bob never learn.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Clement and La Frenais' sitcom sequel. Terry is off his beer and making midnight visits to Bob's house to discuss the meaning and mystery of life. Could this be love.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Sitcom about two ill-matched friends, from the writers of Porridge and Auf Wiedersehen Pet. Bob's married life promises work, worry and wallpapering.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish laughs. According to Shakespeare, 'wine is a gentle stimulant and good companion' - and so is Terry on the night Bob gets breathalysed.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The original men behaving badly. Bob and Terry challenge each other to a cross-country cycle race. Of course, you would expect the wily Terry to cheat - but Bob.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After the electrocuted body of a man is found, Murdoch and Brackenreid investigate a pair of researchers known as 'The Frankensteins' for their bizarre psychological studies.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden's weekend at a country inn goes awry when a guest is murdered.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Virtue Ministry, two controversial courtships continue. Watts is unnerved by the public's reaction to his liaison with Jack.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Trapped in elaborate puzzle rooms within an abandoned factory, Murdoch, Ogden, Crabtree and Brackenreid must escape or face horrific deaths.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Dominion of New South Mimico: Murdoch investigates a murder at the Newsome Estate, which has declared itself a nation.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a celebrated concert pianist is murdered one night in his studio, Catherine's friendship with the victim's family puts her in unexpected danger.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A sandfly bite lands Neville in the hospital, and despite being advised to rest, his detective instincts take over when a nurse takes her own life during a night shift.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing priest is asked to look after Lady Felicia's wayward niece Bunty, who soon finds herself suspected of murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Period drama series. Father Brown struggles to promote understanding when a group of pagans are suspected of killing one of their own.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After suspicious circumstances surround the death of a local fighter, Father Brown is drawn into the shady world of boxing to try and uncover the truth.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Series with GK Chesterton's spiritual sleuth. When a local writer is murdered, Father Brown must delve into her infamous novel Lulu and Lucia for inspiration.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: When Frank receives an invitation to a murder mystery party, the team find themselves trapped with a killer in their midst.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: When Lu arrives home from a trip to find that a stranger legally owns her home, Spider and the team uncover a cruel scam which soon leads to murder.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A sandfly bite lands Neville in the hospital, and despite being advised to rest, his detective instincts take over when a nurse takes her own life during a night shift.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: Sabrina and her new partner hit the ground running when a pop star receives a death threat, butting heads while racing to find the offender.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A podcaster's murder before TruthCon leads the team into the murky world of conspiracy theorists, including Mark's former commander with PTSD who bonds with Rex.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a celebrated concert pianist is murdered one night in his studio, Catherine's friendship with the victim's family puts her in unexpected danger.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing priest is asked to look after Lady Felicia's wayward niece Bunty, who soon finds herself suspected of murder.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: When Frank receives an invitation to a murder mystery party, the team find themselves trapped with a killer in their midst.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: When Lu arrives home from a trip to find that a stranger legally owns her home, Spider and the team uncover a cruel scam which soon leads to murder.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Virtue Ministry, two controversial courtships continue. Watts is unnerved by the public's reaction to his liaison with Jack.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Trapped in elaborate puzzle rooms within an abandoned factory, Murdoch, Ogden, Crabtree and Brackenreid must escape or face horrific deaths.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Dominion of New South Mimico: Murdoch investigates a murder at the Newsome Estate, which has declared itself a nation.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch meets a Scotland Yard detective who thinks the killer they're after is Jack the Ripper.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer in the mystery set in 19th century Toronto. At a gala ball, Murdoch witnesses the unveiling of a dinosaur.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown joins forces with Chief Inspector Valentine to uncover a dark secret at Helmsley House.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is taken into custody for fatally shooting the man he believed to be serial killer Red John, but bluffs his way out of jail and tries to exonerate himself.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a raw diamond is found at the scene of a murder, Major Crimes sets up a stakeout to take down the suspected gem smugglers.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: The murder of an urban explorer leads Carrie and Al to search for the killer and pick up the trail of clues the victim was following on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Murder on the Day of the Dead: A man receives a voicemail from his wife saying she is being attacked - and when her body turns up, Jack is suspicious of a butterfly found on her clothing.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch meets a Scotland Yard detective who thinks the killer they're after is Jack the Ripper.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer in the mystery set in 19th century Toronto. At a gala ball, Murdoch witnesses the unveiling of a dinosaur.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is taken into custody for fatally shooting the man he believed to be serial killer Red John, but bluffs his way out of jail and tries to exonerate himself.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a raw diamond is found at the scene of a murder, Major Crimes sets up a stakeout to take down the suspected gem smugglers.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown joins forces with Chief Inspector Valentine to uncover a dark secret at Helmsley House.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: The murder of an urban explorer leads Carrie and Al to search for the killer and pick up the trail of clues the victim was following on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Murder on the Day of the Dead: A man receives a voicemail from his wife saying she is being attacked - and when her body turns up, Jack is suspicious of a butterfly found on her clothing.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: Mackenzie is presented with a classic locked-room murder when a hairdresser is found strangled to death in her beauty salon, with no evidence of a break-in.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Neville must solve a mystery from the past that unlocks the truth of who murdered renowned concert pianist Pasha Verdinikov and why.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Our Guy in China
programme.desc: Guy Martin explores Beijing as he buys a rudimentary Flying Pigeon bicycle, finds out how China's super-rich live, and races the 'Nigel Mansell of rickshaws'.

programme.title: Our Guy in China
programme.desc: Guy Martin concludes his Chinese adventure by trying to break the record for the fastest crossing of the Taklamakan Desert - the 'desert of death' - on a bicycle.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo visits Yosemite National Park in California, beholding its granite cliffs, sequoia trees and waterfalls.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: In the port of Monterey, Michael Portillo discovers the city's Spanish and Mexican heritage.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo discovers the secrets of backyard oil drilling in Los Angeles and joins the locals for Mexican Independence Day.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie helps rescue a runaway narrowboat on the scenic Macclesfield Canal and cruises through autumn scenery toward Congleton to see a shipwreck up for sale.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Fallen trees block Robbie's journey on the Peak Forest Canal. Later, he meets TV host Terry Christian, whose dad once worked a local waterway.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie navigates the wintery Grand Union Canal while preparing for Christmas and narrowly avoids flooding his boat in a tricky staircase lock.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve traces the path of the northern tropic around the globe. He begins in Mexico before heading east to Cuba and finishing in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels through Western Sahara, Mauritania, Algeria and Libya, meeting campaigners for indigenous people's rights, and visiting a minefield.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his epic adventure. On the third leg of his journey, he rejoins the Tropic of Cancer in Egypt and follows it through Saudi Arabia, Dubai and Oman.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie helps rescue a runaway narrowboat on the scenic Macclesfield Canal and cruises through autumn scenery toward Congleton to see a shipwreck up for sale.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Fallen trees block Robbie's journey on the Peak Forest Canal. Later, he meets TV host Terry Christian, whose dad once worked a local waterway.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Frank struggles while Betty is in hospital, blowing himself up with a steak and kidney pudding, but the fun really starts when he visits Betty in the ward.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Michael Crawford in the classic comedy. Convinced he is a failure, Frank visits a psychiatrist. By the end of his story, the doctor can only agree.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: More fun with Michael Crawford's immortal comic creation. The new manager of the labour exchange refuses to believe that Frank is unemployable.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on one of Derek's favourites - an Austin A35 - but its age ensures some hefty bills. To bank some cash, their second project is a quick flip - a 1999 BMW Z3.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Charlie head south for an immaculate Lotus Super 7. Derek and Jack are in Sheffield collecting a 1929 Riley Monaco and a 1924 Alvis 12/50 tourer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Charlie pick up a JZR three wheeler speed demon while Dave gets nostalgic over a brace of Raleigh Choppers, a few Honda C90s and a rare Mark 1 Ford Granada.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will seek a Scandinavian car and settle on a Saab. They'd prefer a classic 99, but can only find an older 99 that was bought for a rally but can't go the distance.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will set out to buy a Honda-based Rover 800 coupe. At only 650 pounds it seems too good to be true - and when they turn up, they aren't sure whether to proceed.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Our Guy in India
programme.desc: Guy Martin buys a Royal Enfield bike with a traditional Hindu blessing at a Delhi market, visits Asia's biggest truck yard, and sleeps among rats as he waits for a late train.

programme.title: Our Guy in India
programme.desc: Guy Martin clambers up India's tallest building and has his preconceptions about slums challenged in Mumbai before heading to Goa and the Rider Mania motorbike race.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of beautiful Swedish models - a Saab 96L and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A 1967 Aston Martin DB6 lands at the Mathewsons' - Derek believes it could break the record for the most expensive car ever sold at the auction.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: In Poland lies a forgotten Nazi complex which could have sheltered up to 27,244 people from Allied bombs, the purpose of which largely remains a mystery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Tatton Park in Cheshire, where items include one of the rarest known pieces of Royal Worcester porcelain.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts examine more rarities at Tatton Park in Cheshire, including an inkstand with a link to Admiral Nelson.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul's doing the pick-ups in Lancashire where a rare 1960 Vauxhall Cresta PA Friary estate in dusky pink awaits.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A vivid Dutch DAF 66 - in daffodil yellow - lands at the North Yorkshire showroom.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: In Poland lies a forgotten Nazi complex which could have sheltered up to 27,244 people from Allied bombs, the purpose of which largely remains a mystery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Tatton Park in Cheshire, where items include one of the rarest known pieces of Royal Worcester porcelain.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie struggles with grounding out, a tangled prop and constant challenges on the Rochdale Canal - known as the 'Everest of Canals' - to reach its highest point.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie takes a detour to investigate a local UFO legend in Todmorden, and the UK's deepest canal lock springs a leak, causing trouble for the Naughty Lass.

programme.title: Operation Gold Rush
programme.desc: The team arrives at Dawson City and sets up a mining camp in the gold fields - but they have just five days to find gold using only traditional 19th-century methods.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul's doing the pick-ups in Lancashire where a rare 1960 Vauxhall Cresta PA Friary estate in dusky pink awaits.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A vivid Dutch DAF 66 - in daffodil yellow - lands at the North Yorkshire showroom.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: Babe, an orphaned pig, learns to herd sheep after a farmer wins him in a contest at a country fair. However, the lead sheepdog doesn't like Babe. Starring Magda Szubanski. (1995)

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the final match of the final round in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Steel host the Tactix from ILT Stadium Southland in Invercargill.

programme.title: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ
programme.desc: It’s Shorty stars past and present, Michael Galvin, Kim Crossman and Ria Vandervis. Will they flatline, or can they extract the jackpot counter from our mighty machine with surgical precision?

programme.title: Booze Patrol
programme.desc: Karma is a good guy... but has a habit of making bad decisions. The latest one was deciding to drive after three cold beers while he spent the afternoon fishing. S16 E3

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Season Finale: A new Taskmaster Champion will be crowned once the dust, feathers and lint have all settled.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's Family Favourites week and social media sensation Andy Cooks (chef Andy Hearnden) is on the hunt for the ultimate breakfast, in an immunity challenge with 60 minutes on the clock. S18 E8

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: The race for Chief resident intensifies as Joan tasks Amy and Sonya with evaluating each other's case work. Amy tends to a politician with a disability. S2 E13

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan and Harper try to help a desperate mother protect her child; Lt. Grey and Garza continue to work with Monica despite their misgivings. S8 E17

programme.title: The Fatal Attraction Murder
programme.desc: The investigation goes cold until a trip to Puerto Rico shifts the focus onto Carolyn. S1 E2

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Maxwell finds that his relationship with Fran is moving too fast. Niles advises him to come up with a plan to distract her, so Maxwell asks Fran to redecorate the kitchen. S5 E1

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back with a bang! Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Tama, Buzz, and the new kid on the block, Riki. Get ready for laughter, learning, and lots of fun!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's Family Favourites week and social media sensation Andy Cooks (chef Andy Hearnden) is on the hunt for the ultimate breakfast, in an immunity challenge with 60 minutes on the clock. S18 E8

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: This week the Aussie travel guides are embarking on a luxury river cruise down the Mekong River from Cambodia to Southern Vietnam.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As Krusty's new assistant, Lisa steals the spotlight and gets a TV show of her own. S19 E20

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Amy awaits the completion of repairs on her apartment, she suggests to a stupefied Sheldon that they should move in together. S10 E4

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Richie gets it wrong. Cash struggles with Eden's decision. Crime escalates in Summer Bay.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody keeps his distance.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: In an elimination challenge centred on reinventing the judges' quick carb midweek dinner recipes, mistakes and time pressure sends one cook home. S18 E9

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Rob Brydon takes 13 strangers on the adventure of a lifetime - but can they figure out where in the world they are? S1 E1

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Bex and the team hurry to catch Elliot Carr, a high-end shoemaker and serial killer known as the Connecticut Cobbler; Elliot has a fresh approach that the team must figure out. S2 E8

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Taskmaster Greg Davies dishes out more praise and vitriol at his poor cast of comics. S7 E9

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Sara turn to Lady Heather for help in tracking down the culprit responsible for injuring a woman before she was seemingly mauled to death by a mountain lion. S11 E19

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: Season Premiere: A white supremacist couple's campaign of vigilantism ends in violence, with a shocking double murder. S8 E1

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Frobisher unleashes everything he has in order to gain control of evidence that could undermine him in court. S1 E12

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: A unique family of employees at a super-sized megastore hilariously tackle the day-to-day grind of rabid bargain hunters, riot-causing sales, and nap-worthy training sessions.
